agreementToTerms.title: 1. GENERAL PROVISIONS
agreementToTerms.description1: 1.1. These Terms and Conditions govern the use of website smokyconcepts.com (hereinafter referred to as the "Website"). 1.2. By accessing or using the Website, you agree to these Terms.
agreementToTerms.description2: 1.3. If you do not agree to any part of these Terms, please do not use the Website. 1.4. The Website reserves the right to modify these Terms without prior notice. Changes become effective upon their publication on the Website. 1.5. Continued use of the Website implies acceptance of the updated Terms.

useLicense.title: 2. KEY DEFINITIONS
useLicense.description: The following definitions apply in these Terms:

restrictions.modify: Website – The online platform smokyconcepts.com offering services, content, and various functionalities.
restrictions.commercial: User – Any individual or legal entity accessing or using the Website.
restrictions.reverse: Services – All products, services, content, and tools available via the Website.
restrictions.copyright: Content – Any text, images, videos, audio, or other materials available on the Website.
restrictions.transfer: Intellectual Property and Transaction – Website name, logo, texts, software, and other protected elements, and any purchase, service registration, or other contractual agreement on the Website.

requirements.accurate: Use the Website only for lawful purposes.
requirements.maintain: Not interfere with the Website's technical operation.
requirements.security: Not distribute viruses, malware, or any harmful code.
requirements.responsibility: Not attempt to illegally access Website servers or data.
requirements.notify: Not publish or distribute illegal, offensive, defamatory, or hate-inducing content. 3.2. The Website reserves the right to block any User who violates these Terms.

productInformation.title: 4. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
productInformation.description1: 4.1. The Website is provided "as is" without any warranties. 4.2. The Website is not responsible for any errors or technical malfunctions, as well as incorrect or false information entered by Users.
productInformation.description2: The Website is also not responsible for damages resulting from third-party interactions with the Website or for the accuracy, reliability, or timeliness of the provided content. 4.3. The Website is not liable for indirect damages, including lost revenue or data loss.

pricingAndPayment.title: 5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
pricingAndPayment.description1: 5.1. All materials on the Website, including texts, images, logos, and software, belong to the Website or its rightful owners.
pricingAndPayment.description2: 5.2. Copying, distributing, selling, or using any content without prior written permission is strictly prohibited.
pricingAndPayment.description3: 5.3. The User has no right to use the Website's trademark or domain name without written permission.

shippingAndDelivery.title: 6. PAYMENTS AND REFUNDS
shippingAndDelivery.description1: 6.1. If the Website offers paid services, payments must be made under the specified conditions. 6.2. The Website may change prices or payment terms without prior notice.
shippingAndDelivery.description2: 6.3. If applicable, refund policies will be outlined separately on the Website.

returnsAndRefunds.title: 7. DISPUTE RESOLUTION
returnsAndRefunds.description1: 7.1. These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Armenia. 7.2. All disputes should first be resolved through negotiations.
returnsAndRefunds.description2: 7.3. If negotiations fail, disputes will be handled in the competent courts of Armenia.

prohibitedUses.title: 8. FORCE MAJEURE
prohibitedUses.description: 8.1. The Website is not responsible for failure or delay in fulfilling obligations due to force majeure circumstances, including:

items.impersonate: Military conflicts, terrorism, or civil unrest.
items.infringe: Technical failures beyond the Website's control.
items.automated: Other extraordinary circumstances beyond the Website's control.

limitationOfLiability.title: 9. PRIVACY AND DATA PROTECTION
limitationOfLiability.description: 9.1. The Website commits to protecting user data in accordance with the Privacy Policy. 9.2. The Website may collect and process user data for legal purposes. 9.3. The Website reserves the right to disclose user data to authorities as required by law.
